
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Looking at the scene, I can see that Glass\_37 appears to be a blue circular object. However, I should get closer and verify this before attempting to pick it up. Let me move closer to get a better view.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.91,
  "y": 0.62,
  "z": 0.93
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 77336098, 't1': 77337448, 'elapsed': 1350}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6422, completion=145, total=6567
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=1.17, y=0.08, z=1.14\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now that I'm closer to the area, let me look directly at the object to confirm it matches the description.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.91,
  "y": 0.62,
  "z": 0.93
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762960958646, 'end': 1762960964665, 'elapsed': 6019}`

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I can now confirm that Glass\_37 is indeed a blue circular object matching the description. Now that I've verified the target object, I will proceed to pick it up.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Glass_37"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object Glass\_37

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular glass object as requested. The object was clearly visible in my perception and matched the description you provided. The pick action was completed without any issues.
